Javascript
import React, { useState, useMemo, useEffect } from 'react';
import { 
  ShieldCheck, 
  Info, 
  Thermometer, 
  Syringe, 
  Users, 
  AlertCircle, 
  Plus, 
  Search, 
  Trash2, 
  Edit2, 
  X, 
  Save,
  Activity,
  Factory,
  ArrowRightLeft,
  LayoutGrid,
  List
} from 'lucide-react';

/**
 * RSV Vaccine Management Dashboard
 * Designed for healthcare providers to track and compare RSV treatments.
 */
function App({ data, updateItem, deleteItem, insertItem, moveItem }) {
  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
  const [editingIndex, setEditingIndex] = useState(null);
  const [editFormData, setEditFormData] = useState([]);
  const [viewMode, setViewMode] = useState('grid'); // 'grid' or 'list'

  // --- Data Extraction & Transformation ---
  
  // Headers discovery
  const headers = useMemo(() => data[0]?.row || [], [data]);
  
  // Helper to find column index by text content (robust discovery)
  const findCol = (searchStrings) => {
    return headers.findIndex(h => searchStrings.some(s => h?.toString().includes(s)));
  };

  const colIdx = {
    name: 0,
    type: 1,
    manufacturer: 2,
    audience: 3,
    dosage: 4,
    sideEffects: 5,
    storage: 6,
    source: 7
  };

  // Convert raw data to objects
  const records = useMemo(() => {
    if (!data || data.length <= 1) return [];
    return data.slice(1).map(item => ({
      index_: item.index_,
      name: item.row[colIdx.name] || '',
      type: item.row[colIdx.type] || '',
      manufacturer: item.row[colIdx.manufacturer] || '',
      audience: item.row[colIdx.audience] || '',
      dosage: item.row[colIdx.dosage] || '',
      sideEffects: item.row[colIdx.sideEffects] || '',
      storage: item.row[colIdx.storage] || '',
      source: item.row[colIdx.source] || '',
      raw: item.row
    }));
  }, [data]);

  // --- Statistics Logic (Fixed for consistency) ---
  const stats = useMemo(() => {
    let active = 0;
    let passive = 0;
    
    records.forEach(r => {
      const typeStr = (r.type || '').toString();
      // Robust Hebrew string checking using Regex to avoid hidden char issues
      if (/פעיל/.test(typeStr)) active++;
      else if (/סביל/.test(typeStr)) passive++;
    });
    
    return {
      total: records.length,
      active,
      passive
    };
  }, [records]);

  // --- Search Filtering ---
  const filteredRecords = useMemo(() => {
    const query = searchTerm.toLowerCase().trim();
    if (!query) return records;
    return records.filter(r => 
      r.name.toLowerCase().includes(query) || 
      r.manufacturer.toLowerCase().includes(query) ||
      r.type.toLowerCase().includes(query)
    );
  }, [records, searchTerm]);

  // --- Handlers ---
  const startEdit = (rec) => {
    setEditFormData([...rec.raw]);
    setEditingIndex(rec.index_);
  };

  const saveEdit = () => {
    if (editingIndex !== null) {
      updateItem(editingIndex, editFormData);
      setEditingIndex(null);
    }
  };

  const handleInputChange = (idx, val) => {
    const next = [...editFormData];
    next[idx] = val;
    setEditFormData(next);
  };

  const handleAddNew = () => {
    const newRow = Array(headers.length).fill('');
    insertItem(undefined, newRow);
  };

  // --- Render Helpers ---
  const getTypeStyles = (type) => {
    const isPassive = /סביל/.test(type);
    return isPassive 
      ? 'bg-amber-50 text-amber-700 border-amber-200' 
      : 'bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border-emerald-200';
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-slate-50 text-slate-900 font-sans" dir="rtl" style={{ fontFamily: 'system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif' }}>
      {/* Top Banner */}
      <header className="bg-white border-b border-slate-200 sticky top-0 z-40 px-4 py-4 sm:px-8">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center justify-between gap-4">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
            <div className="bg-blue-600 p-2.5 rounded-xl shadow-lg shadow-blue-200">
              <ShieldCheck className="text-white w-6 h-6" />
            </div>
            <div>
              <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-slate-900 leading-none">מאגר חיסוני RSV</h1>
              <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm mt-1">מערכת השוואה וניהול נתוני תרכיבים</p>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
            <div className="relative flex-1 md:w-64">
              <Search className="absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-slate-400 w-4 h-4" />
              <input 
                type="text"
                placeholder="חפש תרכיב או יצרן..."
                className="w-full pr-10 pl-4 py-2.5 bg-slate-100 border-none rounded-xl text-sm focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 transition-all"
                value={searchTerm}
                onChange={(e) => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}
              />
            </div>
            <button 
              onClick={handleAddNew}
              className="bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white p-2.5 rounded-xl shadow-md transition-transform active:scale-95"
              title="הוסף תרכיב"
            >
              <Plus className="w-5 h-5" />
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </header>

      <main className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 py-8 sm:px-8 space-y-8">
        
        {/* Metric Cards */}
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
          <div className="bg-white p-6 rounded-3xl shadow-sm border border-slate-100 flex items-center justify-between">
            <div>
              <span className="text-slate-500 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider">סה"כ תרכיבים</span>
              <div className="text-3xl font-black text-slate-900 mt-1">{stats.total}</div>
            </div>
            <div className="bg-blue-50 p-4 rounded-2xl">
              <Activity className="text-blue-600 w-6 h-6" />
            </div>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-white p-6 rounded-3xl shadow-sm border border-slate-100 flex items-center justify-between">
            <div>
              <span className="text-slate-500 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider">חיסונים פעילים</span>
              <div className="text-3xl font-black text-emerald-600 mt-1">{stats.active}</div>
            </div>
            <div className="bg-emerald-50 p-4 rounded-2xl">
              <Syringe className="text-emerald-600 w-6 h-6" />
            </div>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-white p-6 rounded-3xl shadow-sm border border-slate-100 flex items-center justify-between">
            <div>
              <span className="text-slate-500 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider">חיסונים סבילים</span>
              <div className="text-3xl font-black text-amber-600 mt-1">{stats.passive}</div>
            </div>
            <div className="bg-amber-50 p-4 rounded-2xl">
              <ArrowRightLeft className="text-amber-600 w-6 h-6" />
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* View Controls */}
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
          <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-slate-800">רשימת תרכיבים</h2>
          <div className="flex bg-white p-1 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm">
            <button 
              onClick={() => setViewMode('grid')}
              className={`p-2 rounded-lg transition-colors ${viewMode === 'grid' ? 'bg-slate-100 text-blue-600' : 'text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-600'}`}
            >
              <LayoutGrid className="w-5 h-5" />
            </button>
            <button 
              onClick={() => setViewMode('list')}
              className={`p-2 rounded-lg transition-colors ${viewMode === 'list' ? 'bg-slate-100 text-blue-600' : 'text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-600'}`}
            >
              <List className="w-5 h-5" />
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Grid/List View Content */}
        {viewMode === 'grid' ? (
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
            {filteredRecords.map((rec) => (
              <div key={rec.index_} className="bg-white rounded-[2rem] border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 flex flex-col group overflow-hidden">
                <div className="p-6 pb-4">
                  <div className="flex justify-between items-start">
                    <span className={`text-[10px] font-black px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full border ${getTypeStyles(rec.type)}`}>
                      {rec.type || 'ללא סיווג'}
                    </span>
                    <div className="flex gap-1 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity">
                      <button onClick={() => startEdit(rec)} className="p-2 text-slate-400 hover:text-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-50 rounded-lg"><Edit2 className="w-4 h-4" /></button>
                      <button onClick={() => deleteItem(rec.index_)} className="p-2 text-slate-400 hover:text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50 rounded-lg"><Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" /></button>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <h3 className="text-xl font-black text-slate-900 mt-4 leading-tight">{rec.name}</h3>
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-slate-500 text-sm mt-1">
                    <Factory className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
                    {rec.manufacturer}
                  </div>
                </div>

                <div className="p-6 pt-0 space-y-4 flex-1">
                  <div className="space-y-1">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-blue-500">
                      <Users className="w-4 h-4" />
                      <span className="text-[11px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider">קהל יעד</span>
                    </div>
                    <p className="text-sm text-slate-700 leading-relaxed font-medium">
                      {rec.audience}
                    </p>
                  </div>

                  <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 pt-2">
                    <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                      <div className="bg-slate-50 p-1.5 rounded-lg shrink-0 mt-0.5">
                        <Info className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-slate-400" />
                      </div>
                      <div>
                        <span className="text-[10px] font-black text-slate-400 uppercase">מינון ומתן</span>
                        <p className="text-xs text-slate-700 mt-0.5 leading-snug">{rec.dosage}</p>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                      <div className="bg-slate-50 p-1.5 rounded-lg shrink-0 mt-0.5">
                        <AlertCircle className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-slate-400" />
                      </div>
                      <div>
                        <span className="text-[10px] font-black text-slate-400 uppercase">תופעות לוואי</span>
                        <p className="text-xs text-slate-700 mt-0.5 leading-snug line-clamp-2" title={rec.sideEffects}>{rec.sideEffects}</p>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                      <div className="bg-slate-50 p-1.5 rounded-lg shrink-0 mt-0.5">
                        <Thermometer className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-slate-400" />
                      </div>
                      <div>
                        <span className="text-[10px] font-black text-slate-400 uppercase">אחסון</span>
                        <p className="text-xs text-slate-700 mt-0.5 leading-snug">{rec.storage}</p>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>

                <div className="px-6 py-4 bg-slate-50/50 border-t border-slate-100 flex justify-between items-center">
                  <span className="text-[10px] font-mono text-slate-400">ID: {rec.index_}</span>
                  <span className="text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-400">מקור: {rec.source}</span>
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm overflow-hidden overflow-x-auto">
            <table className="w-full text-right border-collapse">
              <thead>
                <tr className="bg-slate-50/80 border-b border-slate-200">
                  {headers.map((h, i) => (
                    <th key={i} className="p-4 text-[10px] font-black text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest whitespace-nowrap">{h}</th>
                  ))}
                  <th className="p-4"></th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody className="divide-y divide-slate-100">
                {filteredRecords.map((rec) => (
                  <tr key={rec.index_} className="hover:bg-blue-50/30 transition-colors group">
                    <td className="p-4 text-sm font-bold text-slate-800">{rec.name}</td>
                    <td className="p-4">
                      <span className={`text-[10px] font-bold px-2 py-0.5 rounded-lg border ${getTypeStyles(rec.type)}`}>
                        {rec.type}
                      </span>
                    </td>
                    <td className="p-4 text-sm text-slate-600">{rec.manufacturer}</td>
                    <td className="p-4 text-xs text-slate-500 max-w-xs truncate" title={rec.audience}>{rec.audience}</td>
                    <td className="p-4 text-xs text-slate-500 max-w-xs truncate" title={rec.dosage}>{rec.dosage}</td>
                    <td className="p-4 text-xs text-slate-500 max-w-xs truncate" title={rec.sideEffects}>{rec.sideEffects}</td>
                    <td className="p-4 text-xs text-slate-500 max-w-xs truncate" title={rec.storage}>{rec.storage}</td>
                    <td className="p-4 text-xs text-slate-400">{rec.source}</td>
                    <td className="p-4 text-left">
                      <div className="flex justify-end gap-2 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity">
                        <button onClick={() => startEdit(rec)} className="p-1.5 text-slate-400 hover:text-blue-600"><Edit2 className="w-4 h-4" /></button>
                        <button onClick={() => deleteItem(rec.index_)} className="p-1.5 text-slate-400 hover:text-red-600"><Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" /></button>
                      </div>
                    </td>
                  </tr>
                ))}
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        )}

        {filteredRecords.length === 0 && (
          <div className="text-center py-20 bg-white rounded-[3rem] border border-dashed border-slate-300">
            <div className="bg-slate-100 w-20 h-20 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-4">
              <Search className="w-8 h-8 text-slate-300" />
            </div>
            <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-slate-700">לא נמצאו תרכיבים</h3>
            <p className="text-slate-400 mt-2">נסה לשנות את מילות החיפוש או הוסף תרכיב חדש</p>
            <button onClick={() => setSearchTerm('')} className="mt-6 text-blue-600 font-bold hover:underline">נקה חיפוש</button>
          </div>
        )}
      </main>

      {/* Edit Modal */}
      {editingIndex !== null && (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-slate-900/60 backdrop-blur-sm z-[100] flex items-center justify-center p-4">
          <div className="bg-white rounded-[2.5rem] shadow-2xl w-full max-w-2xl max-h-[90vh] overflow-hidden flex flex-col animate-in fade-in zoom-in duration-200">
            <div className="px-8 py-6 border-b border-slate-100 flex justify-between items-center bg-slate-50/50">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                <div className="p-2.5 bg-blue-100 rounded-2xl">
                  <Edit2 className="text-blue-600 w-5 h-5" />
                </div>
                <div>
                  <h2 className="text-xl font-black text-slate-900">עריכת פרטי תרכיב</h2>
                  <p className="text-xs text-slate-400">עדכון מידע קליני ולוגיסטי</p>
                </div>
              </div>
              <button 
                onClick={() => setEditingIndex(null)}
                className="p-2 hover:bg-slate-200 rounded-full text-slate-400 transition-colors"
              >
                <X className="w-6 h-6" />
              </button>
            </div>

            <div className="p-8 overflow-y-auto space-y-6">
              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
                {headers.map((header, idx) => {
                  const isLong = [3, 4, 5, 6].includes(idx);
                  return (
                    <div key={idx} className={isLong ? "sm:col-span-2 space-y-1.5" : "space-y-1.5"}>
                      <label className="block text-[11px] font-black text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest px-1">
                        {header}
                      </label>
                      {isLong ? (
                        <textarea 
                          className="w-full p-4 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-2xl text-sm min-h-[100px] focus:ring-4 focus:ring-blue-500/10 focus:border-blue-500 focus:bg-white transition-all outline-none resize-none leading-relaxed"
                          value={editFormData[idx] || ''}
                          onChange={(e) => handleInputChange(idx, e.target.value)}
                        />
                      ) : (
                        <input 
                          type="text"
                          className="w-full p-4 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-2xl text-sm font-bold focus:ring-4 focus:ring-blue-500/10 focus:border-blue-500 focus:bg-white transition-all outline-none"
                          value={editFormData[idx] || ''}
                          onChange={(e) => handleInputChange(idx, e.target.value)}
                        />
                      )}
                    </div>
                  );
                })}
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="p-8 border-t border-slate-100 flex justify-end gap-4 bg-slate-50/50">
              <button 
                onClick={() => setEditingIndex(null)}
                className="px-6 py-3 text-slate-600 font-bold hover:bg-slate-200 rounded-2xl transition-all"
              >
                ביטול
              </button>
              <button 
                onClick={saveEdit}
                className="px-10 py-3 bg-blue-600 text-white font-black rounded-2xl shadow-xl shadow-blue-100 hover:bg-blue-700 transition-all flex items-center gap-2 active:scale-95"
              >
                <Save className="w-5 h-5" />
                שמירה
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

Javascript
import React, { useState, useMemo } from 'react';
import { 
  ShieldCheck, 
  Activity, 
  Users, 
  Stethoscope, 
  Thermometer, 
  Info, 
  Search, 
  Plus, 
  Edit3, 
  Trash2, 
  ChevronRight, 
  Syringe,
  AlertCircle,
  LayoutGrid,
  List,
  X,
  Save,
  Clock,
  TrendingUp,
  Layout
} from 'lucide-react';

function App({ data, updateItem, deleteItem, insertItem, moveItem }) {
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('explorer');
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
  const [selectedId, setSelectedId] = useState(null);
  const [isAdding, setIsAdding] = useState(false);
  const [editingIndex, setEditingIndex] = useState(null);
  const [viewMode, setViewMode] = useState('grid');

  // --- Data Logic ---
  const headers = useMemo(() => data[0]?.row || [], [data]);
  
  const records = useMemo(() => {
    if (!data || data.length <= 1) return [];
    return data.slice(1).map(item => ({
      index_: item.index_,
      name: item.row[0] || '',
      type: item.row[1] || '',
      manufacturer: item.row[2] || '',
      audience: item.row[3] || '',
      dosage: item.row[4] || '',
      sideEffects: item.row[5] || '',
      storage: item.row[6] || '',
      source: item.row[7] || '',
      raw: item.row
    }));
  }, [data]);

  const filteredRecords = useMemo(() => {
    return records.filter(r => 
      r.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
      r.manufacturer.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
      r.type.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())
    );
  }, [records, searchQuery]);

  const selectedRecord = useMemo(() => 
    records.find(r => r.index_ === selectedId), [records, selectedId]
  );

  // --- Theme Logic ---
  const getBrandTheme = (m) => {
    const brand = m?.toLowerCase() || '';
    if (brand.includes('sanofi')) return {
      gradient: 'from-indigo-500 to-purple-600',
      bg: 'bg-indigo-50',
      text: 'text-indigo-700',
      border: 'border-indigo-100',
      accent: 'bg-indigo-500'
    };
    if (brand.includes('gsk')) return {
      gradient: 'from-orange-400 to-rose-600',
      bg: 'bg-orange-50',
      text: 'text-orange-700',
      border: 'border-orange-100',
      accent: 'bg-orange-500'
    };
    if (brand.includes('pfizer')) return {
      gradient: 'from-blue-400 to-indigo-600',
      bg: 'bg-blue-50',
      text: 'text-blue-700',
      border: 'border-blue-100',
      accent: 'bg-blue-500'
    };
    return {
      gradient: 'from-slate-400 to-slate-600',
      bg: 'bg-slate-50',
      text: 'text-slate-700',
      border: 'border-slate-100',
      accent: 'bg-slate-500'
    };
  };

  // --- Handlers ---
  const handleSave = (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    const formData = new FormData(e.target);
    const rowArray = headers.map((_, i) => formData.get(`col-${i}`));
    
    if (editingIndex !== null) {
      updateItem(editingIndex, rowArray);
      setEditingIndex(null);
    } else {
      insertItem(undefined, rowArray);
      setIsAdding(false);
    }
  };

  const startEdit = (rec) => {
    setEditingIndex(rec.index_);
    setIsAdding(true);
  };

  return (
    <div className="flex h-screen bg-[#fcfdfe] text-slate-900 overflow-hidden" dir="rtl" style={{ fontFamily: 'system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif' }}>
      
      {/* SECTION 1: Colorful Sidebar */}
      <aside className="w-80 bg-white border-l border-slate-100 flex flex-col hidden lg:flex shadow-2xl shadow-slate-100/50 z-30">
        <div className="p-10">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-4 mb-12">
            <div className="w-14 h-14 bg-gradient-to-tr from-blue-600 to-indigo-700 rounded-[1.25rem] flex items-center justify-center shadow-xl shadow-blue-100">
              <ShieldCheck className="text-white w-8 h-8" />
            </div>
            <div>
              <h1 className="text-2xl font-black tracking-tight text-slate-900 leading-none">VaxPortal</h1>
              <span className="text-[10px] font-black text-blue-500 uppercase tracking-widest mt-1 block">Clinical Dashboard</span>
            </div>
          </div>

          <nav className="space-y-3">
            {[
              { id: 'explorer', label: 'מאגר תרכיבים', icon: LayoutGrid },
              { id: 'stats', label: 'לוח נתונים', icon: Activity }
            ].map((item) => (
              <button 
                key={item.id}
                onClick={() => setActiveTab(item.id)}
                className={`w-full flex items-center gap-4 px-6 py-4 rounded-2xl transition-all group relative overflow-hidden ${
                  activeTab === item.id 
                  ? 'bg-blue-600 text-white shadow-xl shadow-blue-100' 
                  : 'text-slate-500 hover:bg-slate-50 hover:text-slate-900'
                }`}
              >
                <item.icon className={`w-5 h-5 ${activeTab === item.id ? 'text-white' : 'group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform'}`} />
                <span className="font-bold text-sm">{item.label}</span>
                {activeTab === item.id && (
                  <div className="absolute left-3 w-1.5 h-6 bg-white/20 rounded-full" />
                )}
              </button>
            ))}
          </nav>
        </div>

        <div className="mt-auto p-8">
          <div className="bg-slate-900 rounded-[2.5rem] p-8 text-white relative overflow-hidden shadow-2xl">
            <div className="absolute -right-4 -bottom-4 w-32 h-32 bg-blue-500/10 rounded-full blur-3xl" />
            <h4 className="text-[10px] font-black text-blue-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-6">סיכום תרכיבים</h4>
            <div className="flex justify-between items-end">
              <div>
                <div className="text-4xl font-black leading-none">{records.length}</div>
                <div className="text-[10px] text-slate-400 font-bold mt-2 uppercase">תרכיבים במערכת</div>
              </div>
              <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-white/5 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center">
                <TrendingUp className="text-blue-400 w-6 h-6" />
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </aside>

      {/* SECTION 2: Header and Main Content */}
      <main className="flex-1 flex flex-col relative overflow-hidden">
        
        {/* Dynamic Header */}
        <header className="h-28 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-slate-100 px-10 flex items-center justify-between sticky top-0 z-20">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-8 flex-1 max-w-3xl">
            <div className="relative flex-1">
              <Search className="absolute right-6 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-slate-300 w-5 h-5" />
              <input 
                type="text" 
                placeholder="חפש תרכיב, יצרן או התוויה..."
                className="w-full h-14 pr-14 pl-6 bg-slate-50 border border-transparent rounded-[1.25rem] focus:bg-white focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-4 focus:ring-blue-500/5 transition-all text-sm font-semibold placeholder:text-slate-400 outline-none"
                value={searchQuery}
                onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
              />
            </div>
            
            <div className="flex bg-slate-100 p-1.5 rounded-2xl">
              <button 
                onClick={() => setViewMode('grid')}
                className={`p-3 rounded-xl transition-all ${viewMode === 'grid' ? 'bg-white shadow-sm text-blue-600' : 'text-slate-400'}`}
              >
                <LayoutGrid className="w-5 h-5" />
              </button>
              <button 
                onClick={() => setViewMode('table')}
                className={`p-3 rounded-xl transition-all ${viewMode === 'table' ? 'bg-white shadow-sm text-blue-600' : 'text-slate-400'}`}
              >
                <List className="w-5 h-5" />
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>

          <button 
            onClick={() => { setEditingIndex(null); setIsAdding(true); }}
            className="flex items-center gap-3 bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-2xl font-black text-sm shadow-xl shadow-blue-100 transition-all hover:-translate-y-0.5 active:translate-y-0 active:scale-95"
          >
            <Plus className="w-5 h-5" />
            הוספת רשומה
          </button>
        </header>

        {/* Scrollable View Area */}
        <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-10 custom-scrollbar scroll-smooth">
          {activeTab === 'explorer' ? (
            <>
              {viewMode === 'grid' ? (
                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-3 gap-8">
                  {filteredRecords.map((rec) => {
                    const theme = getBrandTheme(rec.manufacturer);
                    return (
                      <div 
                        key={rec.index_}
                        className="group bg-white rounded-[2.5rem] border border-slate-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-2xl transition-all duration-500 flex flex-col overflow-hidden"
                      >
                        <div className={`h-3 bg-gradient-to-l ${theme.gradient}`} />
                        
                        <div className="p-10 flex-1 flex flex-col">
                          <div className="flex justify-between items-start mb-8">
                            <span className={`text-[10px] font-black px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full border tracking-widest uppercase flex items-center gap-2 ${theme.bg} ${theme.text} ${theme.border}`}>
                              <div className={`w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full ${theme.accent}`} />
                              {rec.manufacturer}
                            </span>
                            <div className="flex gap-2">
                              <button onClick={() => startEdit(rec)} className="p-2.5 text-slate-300 hover:text-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-50 rounded-xl transition-all"><Edit3 className="w-4 h-4" /></button>
                              <button onClick={() => deleteItem(rec.index_)} className="p-2.5 text-slate-300 hover:text-rose-600 hover:bg-rose-50 rounded-xl transition-all"><Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" /></button>
                            </div>
                          </div>

                          <h3 className="text-2xl font-black text-slate-900 mb-2 leading-tight tracking-tight group-hover:text-blue-600 transition-colors">{rec.name}</h3>
                          <div className="text-xs text-slate-400 font-bold mb-8 flex items-center gap-2">
                            <Activity className="w-4 h-4 text-blue-400" />
                            {rec.type}
                          </div>

                          <div className="space-y-6 flex-1">
                            <div className="bg-slate-50/50 p-6 rounded-[2rem] border border-slate-100">
                              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-blue-600 mb-3">
                                <Users className="w-4 h-4" />
                                <span className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest">קהל יעד</span>
                              </div>
                              <p className="text-xs text-slate-600 font-semibold leading-relaxed line-clamp-3 overflow-hidden">
                                {rec.audience}
                              </p>
                            </div>

                            <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-3 pt-2">
                              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-slate-50 px-4 py-2 rounded-full border border-slate-100">
                                <Thermometer className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-slate-400" />
                                <span className="text-[10px] font-black text-slate-500 uppercase">אחסון במקרר</span>
                              </div>
                              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-slate-50 px-4 py-2 rounded-full border border-slate-100">
                                <Stethoscope className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-slate-400" />
                                <span className="text-[10px] font-black text-slate-500 uppercase">IM</span>
                              </div>
                            </div>
                          </div>
                        </div>

                        <button 
                          onClick={() => setSelectedId(rec.index_)}
                          className="w-full py-6 bg-slate-50 group-hover:bg-blue-600 group-hover:text-white text-slate-500 font-black text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest border-t border-slate-100 transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-3"
                        >
                          פרטים מלאים
                          <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4" />
                        </button>
                      </div>
                    );
                  })}
                </div>
              ) : (
                <div className="bg-white rounded-[2.5rem] border border-slate-100 shadow-sm overflow-hidden">
                  <div className="overflow-x-auto">
                    <table className="w-full text-right border-collapse min-w-[1000px]">
                      <thead>
                        <tr className="bg-slate-50/50 border-b border-slate-100">
                          {headers.map((h, i) => (
                            <th key={i} className="px-8 py-6 text-[10px] font-black text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest">{h}</th>
                          ))}
                          <th className="px-8 py-6"></th>
                        </tr>
                      </thead>
                      <tbody className="divide-y divide-slate-50">
                        {filteredRecords.map((rec) => (
                          <tr key={rec.index_} className="hover:bg-blue-50/30 transition-colors group">
                            <td className="px-8 py-6 text-sm font-black text-slate-900">{rec.name}</td>
                            <td className="px-8 py-6">
                              <span className="text-[10px] font-black bg-slate-100 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-slate-600 border border-slate-200">{rec.type}</span>
                            </td>
                            <td className="px-8 py-6 text-sm font-bold text-slate-600">{rec.manufacturer}</td>
                            <td className="px-8 py-6 text-xs text-slate-500 max-w-[200px] truncate">{rec.audience}</td>
                            <td className="px-8 py-6 text-xs text-slate-500 max-w-[150px] truncate">{rec.dosage}</td>
                            <td className="px-8 py-6 text-xs text-slate-500 max-w-[150px] truncate">{rec.sideEffects}</td>
                            <td className="px-8 py-6 text-xs text-slate-500 max-w-[150px] truncate">{rec.storage}</td>
                            <td className="px-8 py-6 text-[10px] text-slate-400 font-mono">{rec.source}</td>
                            <td className="px-8 py-6">
                              <div className="flex gap-2 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-all">
                                <button onClick={() => startEdit(rec)} className="p-2 text-slate-400 hover:text-blue-600"><Edit3 className="w-4 h-4" /></button>
                                <button onClick={() => deleteItem(rec.index_)} className="p-2 text-slate-400 hover:text-rose-600"><Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" /></button>
                              </div>
                            </td>
                          </tr>
                        ))}
                      </tbody>
                    </table>
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}
            </>
          ) : (
            <div className="space-y-10 animate-in fade-in duration-500">
              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-8">
                {[
                  { label: 'סה"כ תרכיבים', val: records.length, icon: Layout, color: 'from-blue-500 to-blue-600' },
                  { label: 'סיווג פעיל', val: records.filter(r => r.type.includes('פעיל')).length, icon: Syringe, color: 'from-emerald-400 to-emerald-600' },
                  { label: 'סיווג סביל', val: records.filter(r => r.type.includes('סביל')).length, icon: Activity, color: 'from-amber-400 to-amber-600' },
                  { label: 'יצרנים', val: new Set(records.map(r => r.manufacturer)).size, icon: Users, color: 'from-purple-500 to-purple-600' }
                ].map((stat, i) => (
                  <div key={i} className="bg-white p-10 rounded-[3rem] border border-slate-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl transition-all group">
                    <div className={`w-14 h-14 bg-gradient-to-br ${stat.color} rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center mb-6 shadow-lg shadow-slate-100 transform group-hover:rotate-6 transition-transform`}>
                      <stat.icon className="text-white w-7 h-7" />
                    </div>
                    <div className="text-4xl font-black text-slate-900 leading-none">{stat.val}</div>
                    <div className="text-[10px] font-black text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest mt-2">{stat.label}</div>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
              
              <div className="bg-white rounded-[3rem] border border-slate-100 p-12 shadow-sm overflow-hidden relative">
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-12">
                  <h3 className="text-2xl font-black text-slate-900 tracking-tight">התפלגות יצרנים רשומים</h3>
                  <div className="text-xs font-black text-blue-600 uppercase tracking-widest">נתונים בזמן אמת</div>
                </div>
                <div className="space-y-10">
                  {Array.from(new Set(records.map(r => r.manufacturer))).map(m => {
                    const count = records.filter(r => r.manufacturer === m).length;
                    const pct = (count / records.length) * 100;
                    const theme = getBrandTheme(m);
                    return (
                      <div key={m} className="space-y-4">
                        <div className="flex justify-between items-end">
                          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                            <div className={`w-3 h-3 rounded-full ${theme.accent}`} />
                            <span className="text-sm font-black text-slate-700 tracking-tight">{m}</span>
                          </div>
                          <span className="text-sm font-black text-blue-600">{count} תרכיבים</span>
                        </div>
                        <div className="h-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-full overflow-hidden border border-slate-100 p-1">
                          <div 
                            className={`h-full bg-gradient-to-r ${theme.gradient} rounded-full transition-all duration-1000 shadow-sm`} 
                            style={{ width: `${pct}%` }} 
                          />
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    );
                  })}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </main>

      {/* SECTION 3: Detail Overlay (Neatly Divided) */}
      {selectedRecord && (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-end bg-slate-900/40 backdrop-blur-md animate-in fade-in duration-300" onClick={() => setSelectedId(null)}>
          <div 
            className="h-full w-full max-w-3xl bg-white shadow-[-20px_0_60px_rgba(0,0,0,0.1)] animate-in slide-in-from-left duration-500 flex flex-col relative"
            onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
          >
            <div className={`h-72 relative overflow-hidden bg-gradient-to-br ${getBrandTheme(selectedRecord.manufacturer).gradient} flex items-end px-16 pb-12`}>
              <div className="absolute top-12 right-12 flex gap-4">
                <button 
                  onClick={() => startEdit(selectedRecord)}
                  className="bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 p-4 rounded-2xl text-white backdrop-blur-md transition-all border border-white/10"
                >
                  <Edit3 className="w-6 h-6" />
                </button>
                <button 
                  onClick={() => setSelectedId(null)}
                  className="bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 p-4 rounded-2xl text-white backdrop-blur-md transition-all hover:rotate-90 duration-300 border border-white/10"
                >
                  <X className="w-6 h-6" />
                </button>
              </div>
              
              <div className="relative z-10 text-white">
                <span className="text-[10px] font-black bg-white/20 border border-white/30 px-4 py-2 rounded-full uppercase tracking-widest backdrop-blur-sm mb-6 inline-block">
                  יצרן: {selectedRecord.manufacturer}
                </span>
                <h2 className="text-5xl font-black leading-none tracking-tight">{selectedRecord.name}</h2>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-4 text-white/80 mt-6 text-sm font-black uppercase">
                  <div className="w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full bg-emerald-400 animate-pulse" />
                  {selectedRecord.type}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-16 space-y-16 custom-scrollbar">
              <section className="animate-in slide-in-from-bottom-8 duration-500 delay-100">
                <h4 className="flex items-center gap-4 text-xs font-black text-blue-600 uppercase tracking-widest mb-8">
                  <Users className="w-6 h-6" />
                  קהל יעד והתוויות קליניות
                </h4>
                <div className="bg-slate-50 p-10 rounded-[3rem] border-r-8 border-blue-500 shadow-sm shadow-blue-50">
                  <p className="text-xl text-slate-700 font-bold leading-relaxed">
                    {selectedRecord.audience}
                  </p>
                </div>
              </section>

              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-12 animate-in slide-in-from-bottom-8 duration-500 delay-200">
                <section>
                  <h4 className="flex items-center gap-3 text-[10px] font-black text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-6">
                    <Clock className="w-5 h-5" />
                    מינון ואופן מתן
                  </h4>
                  <div className="bg-white p-8 rounded-[2rem] border border-slate-100 shadow-sm min-h-[140px]">
                    <p className="text-sm text-slate-600 font-bold leading-relaxed">{selectedRecord.dosage}</p>
                  </div>
                </section>
                <section>
                  <h4 className="flex items-center gap-3 text-[10px] font-black text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-6">
                    <Thermometer className="w-5 h-5" />
                    תנאי אחסון
                  </h4>
                  <div className="bg-white p-8 rounded-[2rem] border border-slate-100 shadow-sm min-h-[140px]">
                    <p className="text-sm text-slate-600 font-bold leading-relaxed">{selectedRecord.storage}</p>
                  </div>
                </section>
              </div>

              <section className="animate-in slide-in-from-bottom-8 duration-500 delay-300">
                <h4 className="flex items-center gap-4 text-xs font-black text-rose-600 uppercase tracking-widest mb-8">
                  <AlertCircle className="w-6 h-6" />
                  תופעות לוואי שכיחות
                </h4>
                <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-4">
                  {(selectedRecord.sideEffects || '').split(/[,;]/).map((eff, i) => (
                    <span key={i} className="bg-rose-50 text-rose-700 px-8 py-4 rounded-[1.5rem] text-sm font-black border border-rose-100 shadow-sm flex items-center gap-3">
                      <div className="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-rose-400" />
                      {eff.trim()}
                    </span>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </section>

              <div className="pt-16 border-t border-slate-100 flex items-center justify-between text-[10px] font-black text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-6">
                  <span>מזהה רשומה: {selectedRecord.index_}</span>
                  <div className="w-1.5 h-1.5 bg-slate-200 rounded-full" />
                  <span>מקור מידע: {selectedRecord.source}</span>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* CRUD Modal (Innovation: Neatly Layered) */}
      {isAdding && (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[100] flex items-center justify-center p-8 bg-slate-900/60 backdrop-blur-md animate-in fade-in zoom-in-95 duration-300">
          <div className="bg-white rounded-[4rem] w-full max-w-3xl overflow-hidden shadow-[0_40px_120px_rgba(0,0,0,0.3)] flex flex-col max-h-[92vh]">
            <form onSubmit={handleSave} className="flex flex-col h-full">
              <div className="px-16 py-12 border-b border-slate-50 flex justify-between items-center bg-slate-50/50">
                <div>
                  <h3 className="text-4xl font-black text-slate-900 tracking-tight">{editingIndex !== null ? 'עריכת תרכיב' : 'הוספת תרכיב חדש'}</h3>
                  <p className="text-sm text-blue-500 font-bold mt-3 uppercase tracking-widest">מערכת ניהול נתונים קליניים</p>
                </div>
                <button 
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => { setIsAdding(false); setEditingIndex(null); }}
                  className="p-5 hover:bg-slate-200 rounded-full text-slate-400 transition-all hover:rotate-90 duration-300"
                >
                  <X className="w-8 h-8" />
                </button>
              </div>
              
              <div className="p-16 overflow-y-auto space-y-10 custom-scrollbar">
                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-10">
                  {headers.map((h, i) => {
                    const val = editingIndex !== null ? records.find(r => r.index_ === editingIndex)?.raw[i] : '';
                    const isLargeField = [3, 4, 5, 6].includes(i);
                    return (
                      <div key={i} className={isLargeField ? "col-span-2 space-y-4" : "space-y-4"}>
                        <label className="text-[10px] font-black text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest px-4 block">{h}</label>
                        {isLargeField ? (
                          <textarea 
                            name={`col-${i}`}
                            defaultValue={val}
                            className="w-full h-36 p-8 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-100 rounded-[2rem] focus:ring-8 focus:ring-blue-500/5 focus:border-blue-500 outline-none transition-all text-sm font-semibold resize-none leading-relaxed"
                          />
                        ) : (
                          <input 
                            type="text"
                            name={`col-${i}`}
                            defaultValue={val}
                            className="w-full h-16 px-8 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-100 rounded-[1.5rem] focus:ring-8 focus:ring-blue-500/5 focus:border-blue-500 outline-none transition-all text-sm font-bold"
                          />
                        )}
                      </div>
                    );
                  })}
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="px-16 py-12 bg-slate-50 border-t border-slate-100 flex justify-end gap-8">
                <button 
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => { setIsAdding(false); setEditingIndex(null); }}
                  className="px-10 py-5 text-slate-500 font-black text-xs uppercase tracking-widest hover:text-slate-800 transition-colors"
                >
                  ביטול
                </button>
                <button 
                  type="submit"
                  className="bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white px-16 py-5 rounded-[1.5rem] font-black text-sm uppercase tracking-widest shadow-2xl shadow-blue-200 transition-all hover:scale-[1.02] active:scale-95 flex items-center gap-4"
                >
                  <Save className="w-5 h-5" />
                  שמירת נתונים
                </button>
              </div>
            </form>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Style Fixes for Hebrew and Scrollbars */}
      <style>{`
        .custom-scrollbar::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 10px; }
        .custom-scrollbar::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: transparent; }
        .custom-scrollbar::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #f1f5f9; border-radius: 20px; border: 4px solid transparent; background-clip: content-box; }
        .custom-scrollbar::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover { background: #e2e8f0; border: 4px solid transparent; background-clip: content-box; }
        
        /* Ensuring clean text rendering */
        * { -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale; }
        body { background: #fcfdfe; }
        
        /* Smooth RTL adjustments */
        [dir="rtl"] .group-hover\:translate-x-0:hover { transform: translateX(0); }
      `}</style>
    </div>
  );
}
